data.title: Implement directory scanning function in directory-monitor.sh
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Create plugins/dso/hooks/lib/directory-monitor.sh with _dm_scan_directories() function.
Reads directory_monitor.file_threshold (default 30) and directory_monitor.exclude_dirs (default .git) from dso-config.conf via read-config.sh.
Runs git ls-files, pipes through dirname/sort/uniq -c, filters .gitignore (automatic via git ls-files) + configurable exclusions.
Returns list of (count, normalized-path) pairs for directories over threshold.
Set executable bit on creation.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/hooks/lib/directory-monitor.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/hooks/lib/directory-monitor.sh
- [ ] Function _dm_scan_directories is defined and sourceable
  Verify: bash -c 'source plugins/dso/hooks/lib/directory-monitor.sh && type _dm_scan_directories'
- [ ] Scanning tests from Task 1 pass (threshold, exclusion, normalization)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-directory-monitor.sh 2>&1 | grep -v 'dedup\|ticket' | grep -q 'PASS\|ok'
- [ ] Reads directory_monitor.file_threshold config with default 30
  Verify: grep -q 'file_threshold' plugins/dso/hooks/lib/directory-monitor.sh
- [ ] Reads directory_monitor.exclude_dirs config with default .git
  Verify: grep -q 'exclude_dirs' plugins/dso/hooks/lib/directory-monitor.sh
- [ ] Uses _PLUGIN_ROOT variable (not hardcoded plugins/dso/ path)
  Verify: ! grep -q 'plugins/dso/' plugins/dso/hooks/lib/directory-monitor.sh || grep -q '_PLUGIN_ROOT\|_PLUGIN_GIT_PATH\|portability-ok\|shim-exempt' plugins/dso/hooks/lib/directory-monitor.sh
